C

calculatePay(int) - Method in interface com.mohanad.edufinance.model.Payable
Calculates the total payment amount based on the number of sessions taught.
calculatePay(int) - Method in class com.mohanad.edufinance.model.Teacher
Implementation of Payable.calculatePay(int).
closeConnection() - Method in class com.mohanad.edufinance.database.DatabaseConnection
Closes the active connection to the SQLite database.

CONFIRMATION - Enum constant in enum class com.mohanad.edufinance.util.CustomAlert.AlertType
Confirmation dialog style.
currentUser - Static variable in class com.mohanad.edufinance.Main
Stores the current logged-in user session polymorphically.
CustomAlert - Class in com.mohanad.edufinance.util
Utility class to display custom-styled alert dialogs matching the application's modern flat light theme, avoiding JavaFX's default OS-dependent styling.
CustomAlert() - Constructor for class com.mohanad.edufinance.util.CustomAlert
 
CustomAlert.AlertType - Enum Class in com.mohanad.edufinance.util
Enum specifying the visual styling and severity of the alert.
